words.def: give a certain impression or have a certain outward aspect
words.zh: v. 出現；呈現；看上去好像（appear的三單形式）

words.def: give a certain impression or have a certain outward aspect
words.zh: vi. 出現, 顯得, 來到

words.def: a particular geographical region of indefinite boundary (usually serving some special purpose or distinguished by its people or culture or geography)
words.zh: n. 區域, 領域；面積（area的複數形式）

words.def: a material made of cellulose pulp derived mainly from wood or rags or certain grasses
words.zh: n. 紙, 檔案, 文章, 報紙, 證券, 證件

words.def: a particular geographical region of indefinite boundary (usually serving some special purpose or distinguished by its people or culture or geography)
words.zh: n. 區域, 面積, 範圍, 空地

words.def: a unit of surface area equal to 100 square meters
words.zh: be的現在時複數或第二人稱單數

words.def: a period marked by distinctive character or reckoned from a fixed point or event
words.zh: n. 時代, 紀元, 時期

words.def: a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
